overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character in a dark robe exploring a ruined castle courtyard at night. The character circumambulates a central fountain bonfire, passes a skeletal NPC guard, and explores outer grounds with wooden barracks and stone perimeter walls before looping back through grassy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with central fountain bonfire

agents.ego_description: walking around the central fountain plaza, observing the bonfire and the ruined castle backdrop

entered.detail: large stone castle ruin with snow-capped roof and warm lit windows
circular fountain basin with lily pads and a large burning bonfire in the center
wet reflective cobblestone ground surrounding the fountain

segments.scene_description: The character walks around a central plaza featuring a fountain with a burning bonfire at its center. The ruined castle looms in the background with illuminated windows, while wet cobblestones reflect the firelight and moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: path leading away from castle main entrance

events.description: character turns away from the castle and heads toward the outer grounds

agents.ego_description: walking past a skeletal NPC guard and continuing along the stone path away from the castle

notable_agents.action: skeletal warrior standing motionless beside the path holding a weapon

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the castle entrance
transition from cobblestone to gravel surface

segments.scene_description: The character passes a stationary skeletal NPC guard and continues along a path leading away from the castle. The fountain falls behind as the character approaches a staircase and transitions onto a gravel path.

scene_state.functional_zone: outer castle grounds with wooden barracks

events.description: passing wooden barracks buildings on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the gravel path away from the castle toward the perimeter wall

entered.detail: low wooden structures with sloped roofs lining the path
tall stone wall enclosing the castle grounds
distant snow-capped mountains under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a gravel path in the outer castle grounds, passing wooden barracks buildings on the right. The castle recedes to the left as distant mountains become visible beyond the perimeter wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy perimeter path along stone wall

events.description: character turns left off the gravel path onto grassy terrain
castle and fountain bonfire become visible again as character approaches

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy path beside the perimeter wall, looping back toward the castle plaza

entered.detail: grassy terrain with scattered puddles and wildflowers
tall evergreen trees scattered along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a grassy path alongside the perimeter wall, leaving the wooden buildings behind. Walking through the grass with scattered puddles, the character loops back toward the castle as the central fountain bonfire comes back into view in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a firelit castle plaza and loops through the outer grounds before returning to the central courtyard. It begins by circling a fountain with a burning bonfire, where wet cobblestones reflect the glow of the flames and the illuminated windows of the looming ruins. As the character passes a stationary skeletal guard, the camera moves away from the fire and transitions from the stone plaza onto a gravel path. The scene then expands into the outer grounds, passing wooden barracks as the castle recedes to the left and distant mountains emerge beyond the perimeter wall. Finally, the path shifts from gravel to grass and scattered puddles, looping the character back toward the castle until the central bonfire reappears in the distance.
